---
title: "Data guides"
description: "Build a clinical data collection tool that works: practical REDCap tutorials."
---

Build a data collection tool that works, step by step. These are the exact
techniques we use to make clinical data arrive clean instead of costing months
of cleanup later.

### 1. Collect quantitative and discrete data in REDCap

<a href="https://youtu.be/zWWHXvnTTBA" target="_blank" class="logo-tutorial-button">REDCap Tutorial I</a>

### 2. Build calculated fields and automated tools

<a href="https://youtu.be/aua_uhDR6mQ" target="_blank" class="logo-tutorial-button">REDCap Tutorial II</a>

### 3. Weighted formulas on a calculated field

<a href="https://youtu.be/xaNZHfuCG4A" target="_blank" class="logo-tutorial-button">REDCap Tutorial IIb</a>

### 4. Export your data from REDCap to Excel

<a href="https://youtu.be/HoHrexo8ix0" target="_blank" class="logo-tutorial-button">REDCap Tutorial III</a>

---

Need a build that isn't covered here? [Tell us about it](jobs.qmd) or email
[bisturiep005@gmail.com](mailto:bisturiep005@gmail.com).
